statistical_question: Which prompt or model performs better
recommended_method: Randomized A/B test or paired comparison
common_failure_mode: Comparing prompts on different item mixes

recommended_method: Rubric score with ordinal or numeric scale
Cohen kappa ICC or Krippendorff alpha
common_failure_mode: Using one evaluator as ground truth

statistical_question: How often are answers wrong or unsupported
recommended_method: Binomial rate logistic regression or mixed model
common_failure_mode: No audit trail for source verification

recommended_method: Calibration curve Brier score logistic calibration
Group comparison logistic regression or hierarchical model
Paired test mixed model or variance components
common_failure_mode: One prompt variant treated as representative

statistical_question: What quality is bought per dollar or second
common_failure_mode: Ignoring cost when quality differences are small

statistical_question: How do length and structure affect quality
common_failure_mode: Confounding prompt length with task difficulty

statistical_question: What themes or errors cluster together

common_failure_mode: Model or prompt version not stored
Reviewing only easy or famous failures
